_comment: Ward settings catalog — hand-curated metadata for Claude Code settings keys.
Transcribed from the live docs on 2026-07-10:
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings  (Available settings + Global config + Worktree + Permission + Sandbox + Attribution sub-tables)
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/permissions (permissions.* + defaultMode enum)
Descriptions are condensed from the doc prose; defaults and enum values are the doc's stated values.
Keys the docs do not document (a handful the Ward brief lists) carry a factual description and no fabricated default.
This file is compiled into the binary via include_str! and deserialized into settings::SettingsCatalog,
so unknown keys like this _comment are ignored on parse.
Top-level shape: { categories: string[], defs: SettingDef[] }.
Each record in `defs` is a SettingDef:
key         (string, required)  the settings key, e.g. "theme" or "permissions"
label       (string, required)  short human title
description (string, required)  one to two sentences on what it does
category    (string, required)  grouping label; MUST appear in `categories`
valueType   (string, required)  one of bool|enum|number|string|array|object
default     (any,    optional)  documented default value; omit when the docs list none
enumValues  (string[], enum)    allowed values; REQUIRED when valueType==enum
targetFile  (string, required)  "settings.json" (default) or "claudeJson" (~/.claude.json global config)
scopes      (string[], optional) writable scopes, subset of user|project|local (managed-only keys use ["managed"])
managedOnly (bool,   optional)  true when only settable via managed-settings.json
minVersion  (string, optional)  first Claude Code version supporting the key, when prominently documented
docsUrl     (string, optional)  link to the documenting page
editor      (string, object)    REQUIRED when valueType==object; one of
permissions|hooks|env|sandbox|statusLine|json

defs.label: Advisor model
defs.description: Model for the server-side advisor tool. Accepts a model alias such as "opus", "sonnet", or "fable", or a full model ID. Written automatically when you run /advisor; unset to disable the advisor.

defs.label: Run as agent
defs.description: Run the main thread as a named subagent, applying that subagent's system prompt, tool restrictions, and model, and set the default agent for sessions dispatched from `claude agents`.

defs.label: Push when Claude decides
defs.description: When Remote Control is connected, allow Claude to send proactive push notifications to your phone, for example when a long task finishes.

defs.label: Allow all claude.ai MCPs
defs.description: Load claude.ai connectors alongside a deployed managed-mcp.json, which otherwise takes exclusive control and suppresses them.

defs.label: Allowed channel plugins
defs.description: Allowlist of channel plugins that may push messages, replacing the default Anthropic allowlist. Undefined falls back to the default; an empty array blocks all channel plugins. Requires channelsEnabled.

defs.label: Allowed HTTP hook URLs
defs.description: Allowlist of URL patterns (supporting * wildcards) that HTTP hooks may target. When set, hooks with non-matching URLs are blocked; an empty array blocks all HTTP hooks. Arrays merge across settings sources.

defs.label: Allowed MCP servers
defs.description: Allowlist of MCP servers users can configure. Undefined means no restrictions; an empty array is a lockdown. Applies to all scopes and the denylist takes precedence.

defs.label: Allow managed hooks only
defs.description: Load only managed hooks, SDK hooks, and hooks from plugins force-enabled in managed settings; user, project, and all other plugin hooks are blocked.

defs.label: Allow managed MCP servers only
defs.description: Respect only the allowedMcpServers from managed settings; deniedMcpServers still merges from all sources. Users can still add MCP servers, but only the admin-defined allowlist applies.

defs.label: Allow managed permission rules only
defs.description: Prevent user and project settings from defining allow, ask, or deny permission rules; only rules in managed settings apply.

defs.label: Always thinking
defs.description: Enable extended thinking by default for all sessions. Typically configured via /config. Set MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=0 in env to force thinking off.

defs.label: API key helper
defs.description: Custom command, run through the system shell, that generates an auth value sent as the X-Api-Key and Authorization: Bearer headers for model requests. Set the refresh interval with CLAUDE_CODE_API_KEY_HELPER_TTL_MS.

defs.label: Question auto-continue timeout
defs.description: Idle time before an unanswered AskUserQuestion dialog auto-continues with whatever options you had selected. With the default, questions wait until you answer them.

defs.label: Attribution
defs.description: Customize attribution for git commits and pull requests. Fields: commit (trailer text; empty string hides it), pr (PR description text), and sessionUrl (append the claude.ai session link; default true).

defs.label: Auto-compact
defs.description: Automatically compact the conversation when context approaches the limit. To disable via environment variable, set DISABLE_AUTO_COMPACT in env.

defs.label: Auto memory directory
defs.description: Custom directory for auto memory storage. Accepts an absolute path or a ~/-prefixed path. From project or local settings it is honored only after you accept the workspace trust dialog.

defs.label: Auto memory
defs.description: Enable auto memory. When false, Claude does not read from or write to the auto memory directory. You can also toggle this with /memory during a session.

defs.label: Auto mode rules
defs.description: Customize what the auto mode classifier blocks and allows. Contains environment, allow, soft_deny, and hard_deny arrays of prose rules; include "$defaults" to inherit the built-in rules. Not read from shared project settings.

defs.label: Auto-scroll
defs.description: In fullscreen rendering, follow new output to the bottom of the conversation. Permission prompts still scroll into view when this is off.

defs.label: Auto-updates channel
defs.description: Release channel to follow for updates. "stable" is typically about a week old and skips versions with major regressions; "latest" is the most recent release. Set DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER in env to disable auto-updates entirely.

defs.label: Available models
defs.description: Restrict which models users can select for the main session, subagents, skills, and the advisor. Does not affect the Default option unless enforceAvailableModels is also set.

defs.label: Session recap
defs.description: Show a one-line session recap when you return to the terminal after a few minutes away. Set to false, or turn off Session recap in /config, to disable.

defs.label: AWS auth refresh
defs.description: Custom script that modifies the .aws directory, used for advanced Amazon Bedrock credential configuration.

defs.label: AWS credential export
defs.description: Custom script that outputs JSON with AWS credentials, used for advanced Amazon Bedrock credential configuration.

defs.label: Screen reader mode
defs.description: Render screen-reader-friendly output: flat text without decorative borders or animations. Always uses the classic renderer, so the tui setting has no effect while active.

defs.label: Blocked marketplaces
defs.description: Blocklist of plugin marketplace sources, enforced on marketplace add and on plugin install, update, refresh, and auto-update. Blocked sources are checked before downloading, so they never touch the filesystem.

defs.label: Browser external page tools
defs.description: Set to "disabled" to prevent Claude from using tools to read or act on external pages in the desktop app's Browser pane. Users can still navigate to external sites themselves.

defs.label: Channels enabled
defs.description: Allow channels for the organization. On claude.ai Team and Enterprise plans, channels are blocked when this is unset or false.

defs.label: Managed CLAUDE.md
defs.description: CLAUDE.md-style instructions injected as organization-managed memory. Only honored in managed or policy settings and ignored in user, project, and local settings.

defs.label: CLAUDE.md excludes
defs.description: Glob patterns or absolute paths of CLAUDE.md files to skip when loading memory. Applies only to user, project, and local memory; managed policy files cannot be excluded.

defs.label: Data retention (days)
defs.description: Claude Code deletes session files and other application data older than this many days at startup (minimum 1; setting 0 fails validation). The same cutoff applies to removing orphaned worktrees.

defs.label: Company announcements
defs.description: Announcements to display to users at startup. If multiple are provided, they are cycled through at random.

defs.label: Default shell
defs.description: Default shell for input-box ! commands. On Windows, "powershell" routes interactive ! commands through PowerShell (requires CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1).

defs.label: Denied MCP servers
defs.description: Denylist of MCP servers that are explicitly blocked. Applies to all scopes including managed servers, and takes precedence over the allowlist.

defs.label: Disable agent view
defs.description: Turn off background agents and agent view: `claude agents`, --bg, /background, and the on-demand supervisor. Equivalent to CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_AGENT_VIEW=1.

defs.label: Disable all hooks
defs.description: Disable all hooks and any custom status line.

defs.label: Disable Artifact tool
defs.description: Disable the Artifact tool, which publishes session output as a private web page on claude.ai. Equivalent to CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ARTIFACT=1.

defs.label: Disable auto mode
defs.description: Set to "disable" to prevent auto mode from being activated: removes auto from the Shift+Tab cycle and rejects --permission-mode auto at startup. Most useful in managed settings.

defs.label: Disable bundled skills
defs.description: Disable the skills and workflows included with Claude Code. Skills from plugins, .claude/skills/, and .claude/commands/ are unaffected. Equivalent to CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BUNDLED_SKILLS=1.

defs.label: Disable claude.ai connectors
defs.description: Disable claude.ai MCP connectors so they are not auto-fetched or connected. true in any source takes precedence. Servers passed via --mcp-config are unaffected.

defs.label: Disable deep link registration
defs.description: Set to "disable" to prevent Claude Code from registering the claude-cli:// protocol handler with the OS at startup. Useful where protocol handler registration is restricted or managed separately.

defs.label: Disabled .mcp.json servers
defs.description: List of specific MCP servers from .mcp.json files to reject.

defs.label: Disable Remote Control
defs.description: Disable Remote Control: blocks `claude remote-control`, the --remote-control flag, auto-start, and the in-session toggle. Typically placed in managed settings for per-device MDM enforcement, but works from any scope.

defs.label: Disable sideload flags
defs.description: Reject the --plugin-dir, --plugin-url, --agents, and --mcp-config CLI flags at startup, which users could otherwise use to bypass strictKnownMarketplaces for a single run.

defs.label: Disable skill shell execution
defs.description: Disable inline shell execution in skills and custom commands from user, project, plugin, or additional-directory sources. Bundled and managed skills are not affected. Most useful in managed settings.

defs.label: Disable workflows
defs.description: Disable dynamic workflows and the bundled workflow commands. Equivalent to CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_WORKFLOWS=1.

defs.label: Editor mode
defs.description: Key binding mode for the input prompt: "normal" or "vim".

defs.label: Effort level
defs.description: Persist the effort level across sessions. Written automatically when you run /effort with one of these values. --effort and CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL override this for one session.

defs.label: Enable all project MCP servers
defs.description: Automatically approve all MCP servers defined in project .mcp.json files.

defs.label: Enable Artifact tool
defs.description: Enable or disable the Artifact tool for this user. When unset, follows the feature's availability for your account. Ignored in project and local settings; a managed disableArtifact takes precedence.

defs.label: Enabled .mcp.json servers
defs.description: List of specific MCP servers from .mcp.json files to approve.

defs.label: Enforce available models
defs.description: Extend the availableModels allowlist to the Default model. When true in managed settings with a non-empty availableModels, the Default option falls back to the first allowlisted entry that is available.

defs.label: Environment variables
defs.description: Environment variables applied to every session and to subprocesses Claude Code spawns. NO_COLOR and FORCE_COLOR set here are passed to subprocesses but do not change Claude Code's own interface colors.

defs.label: Fallback model
defs.description: Fallback model(s) to try in order when the primary model is overloaded or unavailable. "default" expands to the default model; chains are capped at three. This key does not merge across settings files.

defs.label: Fast mode per-session opt-in
defs.description: When true, fast mode does not persist across sessions: each session starts with fast mode off, requiring users to enable it with /fast. The user's fast mode preference is still saved.

defs.label: Feedback survey rate
defs.description: Probability (0-1) that the session quality survey appears when eligible. Set to 0 to suppress it entirely, or set CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY in env.

defs.label: File checkpointing (rewind)
defs.description: Snapshot files before each edit so /rewind can restore them. To disable via environment variable, set CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_FILE_CHECKPOINTING in env.

defs.label: File suggestion script
defs.description: Configure a custom script for @ file autocomplete.

defs.label: Footer link badges
defs.description: Render extra clickable badges in the footer when a regex matches turn output. Each entry has a pattern, a url template with {name} placeholders from named capture groups, and an optional label. Read from user, --settings, and managed settings only.

defs.label: Force login method
defs.description: Restrict login to "claudeai" (Claude.ai accounts), "console" (Claude Console accounts), or "gateway" (a cloud gateway). In managed settings, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN / apiKeyHelper sessions are blocked at startup.

defs.label: Force login gateway URL
defs.description: Pre-fills and locks the gateway URL on the /login Cloud gateway screen. Honored only at the managed policy tier; ignored in user and project settings.

defs.label: Force login org UUID
defs.description: Require login to belong to a specific Anthropic organization. Accepts a single UUID (also pre-selecting it during login) or an array of UUIDs. In managed settings, login fails if the account is not in a listed organization.

defs.label: Force remote settings refresh
defs.description: Block CLI startup until remote managed settings are freshly fetched from the server; if the fetch fails, the CLI exits rather than continuing with cached or no settings.

defs.label: GCP auth refresh
defs.description: Custom script that refreshes GCP Application Default Credentials when they expire or cannot be loaded, used for advanced Vertex AI credential configuration.

defs.label: Hooks
defs.description: Configure custom commands to run at lifecycle events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, and more). See the hooks documentation for the object format.

defs.label: HTTP hook allowed env vars
defs.description: Allowlist of environment variable names HTTP hooks may interpolate into headers. When set, each hook's effective allowedEnvVars is the intersection with this list. Arrays merge across settings sources.

defs.label: Include Co-authored-by trailer (deprecated)
defs.description: Deprecated: superseded by the attribution setting, which takes precedence. Historically added the Co-authored-by: Claude trailer to git commits and PRs. To hide all attribution, set attribution.commit and attribution.pr to empty strings and sessionUrl to false.

defs.label: Include git instructions
defs.description: Include built-in commit and PR workflow instructions and the git status snapshot in Claude's system prompt. Set to false to remove both. CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_GIT_INSTRUCTIONS takes precedence when set.

defs.label: Push when actions required
defs.description: When Remote Control is connected, send a push notification to your phone when a permission prompt or question is waiting for your input.

defs.label: Response language
defs.description: Configure Claude's preferred response language (e.g. "japanese", "spanish", "french"). Also sets the language for voice dictation and auto-generated session titles.

defs.label: Minimum version (downgrade floor)
defs.description: Floor that prevents background auto-updates and `claude update` from installing a version below this one. Differs from requiredMinimumVersion, which blocks startup entirely.

defs.label: Model
defs.description: Override the default model to use for Claude Code. --model and ANTHROPIC_MODEL override this for one session.

defs.label: Model ID overrides
defs.description: Map Anthropic model IDs to provider-specific model IDs such as Amazon Bedrock inference profile ARNs. Each model picker entry uses its mapped value when calling the provider API.

defs.label: OTel headers helper
defs.description: Script to generate dynamic OpenTelemetry headers. Runs at startup and periodically; set the refresh interval with CLAUDE_CODE_OTEL_HEADERS_HELPER_DEBOUNCE_MS.

defs.label: Output style
defs.description: Configure an output style to adjust the system prompt (e.g. "Explanatory"). See the output styles documentation.

defs.label: Parent settings behavior
defs.description: Controls whether managed settings supplied by an embedding host apply when an admin-deployed managed tier is also present. "first-wins": only the admin tier applies. "merge": parent settings apply but can only tighten policy.

defs.label: Permissions
defs.description: Tool and Bash permission rules: allow / ask / deny lists, defaultMode, additionalDirectories, disableBypassPermissionsMode, and skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt.

defs.label: Plans directory
defs.description: Customize where plan files are stored. The path is relative to the project root.

defs.label: Plugin suggestion marketplaces
defs.description: Marketplace names whose plugins can appear as contextual install suggestions. No marketplace-declared suggestions surface without this allowlist.

defs.label: Plugin trust message
defs.description: Custom message appended to the plugin trust warning shown before installation. Use it to add organization-specific context.

defs.label: Policy helper
defs.description: Admin-deployed executable that computes managed settings dynamically at startup. Only honored from MDM or a system managed-settings.json file.

defs.label: Notification channel
defs.description: Method for task-complete and permission-prompt notifications. "auto" sends a desktop notification in iTerm2, Ghostty, and Kitty and does nothing elsewhere; "terminal_bell" rings the bell in any terminal.

defs.label: Reduce motion
defs.description: Reduce or disable UI animations (spinners, shimmer, flash effects) for accessibility.

defs.label: PR URL template
defs.description: URL template for the PR badge shown in the footer and tool-result summaries. Substitutes {host}, {owner}, {repo}, {number}, and {url}. Use to point PR links at an internal code-review tool.

defs.label: Remote Control at startup
defs.description: Connect Remote Control automatically when each interactive session starts. Set true to always auto-connect, false to never, or leave unset to follow your organization's default.

defs.label: Required maximum version
defs.description: Maximum Claude Code version allowed to start. If the running version is newer, Claude Code exits at startup. `claude update`, `claude install`, and `claude doctor` keep working above the ceiling so users can recover.

defs.label: Required minimum version
defs.description: Minimum Claude Code version required to start. If the running version is older, Claude Code exits at startup. Differs from minimumVersion, which prevents downgrades but never blocks startup.

defs.label: Respect .gitignore
defs.description: Control whether the @ file picker respects .gitignore patterns. When true, files matching .gitignore patterns are excluded from suggestions.

defs.label: Respond to shell commands
defs.description: Whether Claude responds after an input-box ! shell command runs. Set to false to add the command output to context without a response.

defs.label: Clear context on plan accept
defs.description: Show the "clear context" option on the plan accept screen. Set to true to restore the option.

defs.label: Show thinking summaries
defs.description: Show extended thinking summaries in interactive sessions. When unset or false, thinking blocks are redacted by the API and shown as a collapsed stub. No effect in non-interactive mode, the Agent SDK, or IDE extensions.

defs.label: Show turn duration
defs.description: Show turn duration messages after responses, e.g. "Cooked for 1m 6s".

defs.label: Skill listing budget fraction
defs.description: Fraction of the model's context window reserved for the skill listing Claude sees each turn (default reserves 1%). When exceeded, least-used skills' descriptions are dropped and only their names are listed.

defs.label: Skill listing max description chars
defs.description: Per-skill character cap on the combined description and when_to_use text in the skill listing Claude sees each turn. Longer text is truncated. Raise to keep long descriptions intact at the cost of more context.

defs.label: Skill visibility overrides
defs.description: Per-skill visibility overrides keyed by skill name. Value is "on", "name-only", "user-invocable-only", or "off". Does not apply to plugin skills. The /skills menu writes these to local settings.

defs.label: Skip WebFetch preflight
defs.description: Skip the WebFetch domain safety check that sends each requested hostname to api.anthropic.com before fetching. Set true in environments that block traffic to Anthropic.

defs.label: Spinner tips
defs.description: Show tips in the spinner while Claude is working. Set to false to disable tips.

defs.label: Spinner tips override
defs.description: Override spinner tips with custom strings. `tips` is an array of tip strings; `excludeDefault` (true) shows only custom tips, otherwise custom tips merge with built-in tips.

defs.label: Spinner verbs
defs.description: Customize the action verbs shown while a turn is in progress. Set mode to "replace" to use only your verbs, or "append" to add them to the defaults.

defs.label: SSH configs
defs.description: SSH connections to show in the Desktop environment dropdown. Each entry requires id, name, and sshHost; sshPort, sshIdentityFile, and startDirectory are optional. Read from managed and user settings only.

defs.label: Status line
defs.description: Configure a custom status line to display context. Optional padding, refreshInterval, and hideVimModeIndicator fields control spacing, periodic re-runs, and the built-in vim mode indicator.

defs.label: Strict known marketplaces
defs.description: Allowlist of plugin marketplace sources. Undefined means no restrictions; an empty array is a lockdown. Enforced on marketplace add and on plugin install, update, refresh, and auto-update.

defs.label: Strict plugin-only customization
defs.description: Block skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers from user and project sources, so they can only come from plugins or managed settings. true locks all four surfaces; an array such as ["skills", "hooks"] locks only the named ones.

defs.label: Disable syntax highlighting
defs.description: Disable syntax highlighting in diffs, code blocks, and file previews.

defs.label: Teammate display mode
defs.description: How agent team teammates display: in-process, auto (split panes under tmux/iTerm2, in-process otherwise), tmux (split panes), or iterm2 (native iTerm2 split panes). --teammate-mode overrides this for one session.

defs.label: Terminal progress bar
defs.description: Show the terminal progress bar in supported terminals: ConEmu, Ghostty 1.2.0+, and iTerm2 3.6.6+.

defs.label: Theme
defs.description: Color theme for the interface. Also accepts a custom theme reference such as "custom:<slug>".

defs.label: Terminal UI renderer
defs.description: Terminal UI renderer. "fullscreen" uses the flicker-free alt-screen renderer with virtualized scrollback; "default" uses the classic main-screen renderer. Set via /tui or CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER.

defs.label: Use auto mode during plan
defs.description: Whether plan mode uses auto mode semantics when auto mode is available. Not read from shared project settings.

defs.label: Verbose output
defs.description: Show full tool output instead of truncated summaries. The --verbose flag overrides this for one session.

defs.label: Transcript view mode
defs.description: Default transcript view mode on startup. Overrides the sticky /focus selection when set. The --verbose flag overrides this for one session.

defs.label: Voice dictation
defs.description: Voice dictation settings: enabled turns dictation on, mode selects "hold" or "tap", and autoSubmit sends the prompt on key release in hold mode. Written automatically when you run /voice. Requires a Claude.ai account.

defs.label: Voice enabled (legacy)
defs.description: Legacy alias for voice.enabled. Prefer the voice object.

defs.label: Wheel scroll acceleration
defs.description: In fullscreen rendering, accelerate mouse-wheel scroll speed during fast scrolls. Set to false for a constant scroll rate per wheel notch.

defs.label: Ultracode keyword trigger
defs.description: Whether the keyword `ultracode` in a prompt triggers a dynamic workflow. Set to false to type the word without triggering one.

defs.label: WSL inherits Windows settings
defs.description: When true, Claude Code on WSL reads managed settings from the Windows policy chain in addition to /etc/claude-code, with Windows sources taking priority. Only honored from the HKLM registry key or the Windows managed-settings.json.

defs.label: Auto-connect to IDE
defs.description: Automatically connect to a running IDE when Claude Code starts from an external terminal. CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_CONNECT_IDE overrides this when set.

defs.label: Auto-install IDE extension
defs.description: Automatically install the Claude Code IDE extension when running from a VS Code terminal. Set CLAUDE_CODE_IDE_SKIP_AUTO_INSTALL=1 to disable.

defs.label: Show last response in external editor
defs.description: Prepend Claude's previous response as #-commented context when you open the external editor with Ctrl+G.

defs.label: Default teammate model
defs.description: Default model for agent team teammates when the spawn prompt doesn't specify one. Set to a model alias such as "sonnet", or null to inherit the lead's current /model selection.

defs.label: Dynamic workflow size
defs.description: Sets the agent count Claude aims for in the dynamic workflows it writes; sent as advice, not an enforced cap. "unrestricted" (the default) sends no guideline.

defs.label: Worktree settings
defs.description: Configure how --worktree creates and manages git worktrees: baseRef (fresh vs head), symlinkDirectories, sparsePaths, and bgIsolation for background sessions.

defs.label: Sandbox
defs.description: Advanced sandboxing for bash commands: enabled (default false), filesystem allow/deny read and write paths, network allowed/denied domains and proxy ports, credential protection, and platform-specific escape hatches.

defs.label: Enabled plugins
defs.description: Controls which plugins are enabled, keyed as "plugin-name@marketplace-name": true/false. A plugin with no entry at any scope falls back to its defaultEnabled value.

defs.label: Extra known marketplaces
defs.description: Additional plugin marketplaces to make available for the repository. Typically used in repository-level settings so team members are prompted to install the marketplace and its plugins when they trust the folder.

defs.label: Plugin configs
defs.description: Per-plugin configuration values keyed by plugin identifier, passed to plugins that accept settings. Not documented in the public settings reference; shape follows each plugin's own configuration schema.

defs.label: Subagent status line
defs.description: Custom status line configuration used for subagent/teammate panes, mirroring the statusLine object. Not documented in the public settings reference.

defs.label: Left arrow opens agents
defs.description: When enabled, pressing the Left arrow at the start of the input opens the agents/background view. Not documented in the public settings reference.

defs.label: Skipped plugins
defs.description: Plugins the user chose to skip when prompted to install from a repository's extraKnownMarketplaces. Stored in user settings so the prompt is not shown again.

defs.label: Skipped marketplaces
defs.description: Plugin marketplaces the user chose to skip when prompted to install from a repository's extraKnownMarketplaces. Stored in user settings so the prompt is not shown again.

defs.label: Managed MCP servers
defs.description: MCP servers deployed via managed settings (managed-mcp.json) that are always available to users. Not documented in the public settings reference; see Managed MCP configuration.

defs.label: SSH host allowlist
defs.description: Allowlist of SSH hosts that the Desktop environment may connect to, complementing sshConfigs. Not documented in the public settings reference.

defs.label: Fast mode
defs.description: Persist fast mode across sessions when enabled (toggled in-session with /fast). See fastModePerSessionOptIn to require per-session opt-in. Not documented in the public settings reference.
